creator: bruce@bmts.us
text:
For what it's worth.  I am also having this problem.  On a fresh install 
of FreeBSD 10 and Samba 3.6.23 I am unable to join a domain.  I have 
several other FreeBSD 9.x servers running and connected to the domain.

There are other bug reports related to this issue that I've found while 
searching for a solution.

https://bugzilla.samba.org/show_bug.cgi?id=10039

http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-questions/2014-March/256592.html
